name: ExtensionBodyStructure_IncludedStructure
title: R5: Included anatomic location(s) (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `BodyStructure.includedStructure` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`BodyStructure.includedStructure` 1..* `BackboneElement`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `BodyStructure.includedStructure` 1..* `BackboneElement`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `BodyStructure.includedStructure` has a context of BodyStructure based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `BodyStructure`.
Element `BodyStructure.includedStructure` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
